text: The Spectator Index Trump's post about the Strait of Hormuz and meeting with China's president. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045328961975324711/photo/1 tweet

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump on Xi Jinping: President Xi is very happy that the Strait of Hormuz is open and/or rapidly opening. Our meeting in China will be a special one and, potentially, Historic. I look forward to being with President Xi — Much will be accomplished! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普谈习近平：习近平主席对于霍尔木兹海峡的开放和/或快速开放感到非常高兴。我们在中国的会晤将是一次特别的，且极具历史意义的会晤。我期待与习近平主席会面——我们将取得巨大成就！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇷🇺U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent confirmed that the U.S. will not renew waivers on Iranian and Russia oil. "We will not be renewing the general license on Russian oil, and we will not be renewing the general license on Iranian oil. Because, again…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The U.S. Treasury has issued a new licence extending relief on sanctions covering Russian crude oil and petroleum products for an additional month, now valid through May 16. This comes after U.S. Treasury Secretary said that the U.S. wasn’t going to extend waivers on Russian oil sanctions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇷🇺美国财政部长贝森特证实，美国将不会延长对伊朗和俄罗斯石油的豁免。“我们将不会延长俄罗斯石油的通用许可证，也不会延长伊朗石油的通用许可证。因为，再次重申……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部已发布一项新许可证，将俄罗斯原油和石油产品的制裁豁免期延长一个月，有效期至5月16日。此前，美国财政部长曾表示美国不会延长对俄罗斯石油制裁的豁免。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Of course they did. The US dropped a Friday night notice lifting sanctions on Russian oil for another month. Comes just 2 days after Treasury Secretary Bessant said the US would not renew the waiver. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 他们当然会这么做。美国在周五晚上发布通知，将俄罗斯石油的制裁豁免期再延长一个月。这距离财政部长贝森特（Bessant）表示美国不会延长豁免期仅过了两天。—— OSINTtechnical 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The US Treasury has authorized transactions involving Russian oil until May 16. The exemption covers oil and petroleum products loaded onto tankers before April 17. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 It's funny because you are watching Trump's intelligence briefing right now. Also, can someone at Fox News please tell Jesse Watters to ease up on the makeup. The man looks like a blow-up doll Mark Rutte would order online. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112) patrols the Arabian Sea, April 17, as U.S. forces enforce the naval blockade on ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. Since commencement of the blockade, 21 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around and return to Iran. tweet

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kpler, a market intelligence and data analytics firm specializing in commodity flows, primarily energy, commented on today's news about the Strait of Hormuz: Strait open, reality constrained Announcements from Iran and the United States point to a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, yet operational realities tell a different story. Vessel movement remains confined to controlled corridors requiring approval, limiting throughput and raising compliance and reputational concerns. At the same time, the US naval posture continues to restrict Iranian exports. Markets have responded with cautious optimism, reflected in a short term pullback in prices, but underlying supply dynamics remain tight. Any meaningful recovery in flows depends on a gradual return of shipowners, beginning with a tentative “first movers” phase that may restore only a fraction of capacity. A full normalisation in trade and confidence is likely to take months, not weeks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 专注于大宗商品流向（主要是能源）的市场情报与数据分析公司 Kpler 对今天有关霍尔木兹海峡的新闻评论道：海峡开放，现实受限。伊朗和美国发布的公告指向霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放，但运营现实却讲述了另一个故事。船舶航行仍局限于需要批准的受控走廊内，这限制了吞吐量，并引发了合规和声誉方面的担忧。与此同时，美国的军事部署继续限制伊朗的出口。市场以谨慎乐观的态度作出了回应，反映在价格的短期回落上，但潜在的供应动态依然紧张。任何有意义的流量恢复都取决于船东的逐步回归，从试探性的“先行者”阶段开始，该阶段可能只能恢复一小部分运力。贸易和信心的全面正常化可能需要数月而非数周时间。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kpler: Ship traffic in the Strait of Hormuz remains limited. Kpler reports traffic is still restricted to approval-only corridors as of Friday evening, hours after the US–Iran announced full reopening. Markets show “cautious optimism,” but supply remains tight and full normalization will take months, not weeks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kpler：霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通仍然有限。Kpler 报告称，截至周五晚上，即美伊宣布全面重新开放数小时后，交通仍仅限于需要批准的走廊。市场表现出“谨慎乐观”，但供应依然紧张，全面正常化将需要数月而非数周时间。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 At least 4 people were killed after a tornado struck Lena, Illinois earlier today. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 今天早些时候，伊利诺伊州莱纳市遭遇龙卷风袭击，造成至少 4 人死亡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇫 British media finally got to Burkina Faso, and the answers weren't what they were looking for. Ibrahim Traore, president and leader of the revolution, sat down with Sky News. The journalist came loaded with gotcha questions. He had no problem answering them. On Russian support he said: "Indeed, Russian President Vladimir Putin wanted to provide us with all the necessary resources to fight terrorism, including military personnel. But I have always said: we are Burkina Faso. No one will come to fight for us, and that is a non-negotiable principle." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇫 英国媒体终于抵达了布基纳法索，但得到的答案并非他们所预期的。革命领导人兼总统易卜拉欣·特拉奥雷（Ibrahim Traore）接受了天空新闻台（Sky News）的采访。记者带着一连串刁钻的问题而来，但他毫无压力地一一作答。在谈到俄罗斯的支持时，他说：“确实，俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京希望为我们提供打击恐怖主义所需的一切资源，包括军事人员。但我一直说：我们是布基纳法索。没有人会来为我们而战，这是一个不可谈判的原则。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇧🇫 Burkina Faso armed forces killed around 100 militants in a combined air and ground operation near Arbinda in the Sahel region. The operation began with precision airstrikes on militant positions some 20 kilometers northeast of Arbinda, followed by a ground sweep. Around 100 fighters were killed in the assault. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇫 布基纳法索武装部队在萨赫勒地区阿尔宾达（Arbinda）附近的一次空地联合行动中击毙了约 100 名武装分子。行动始于对阿尔宾达东北约 20 公里处武装分子阵地的精确空袭，随后进行了地面清剿。此次袭击共击毙约 100 名武装人员。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 Drone crews of the Maxim Krivonos Battalion at work. Destroyed: two "Baba Yaga" drones near Sergeevka and Belyakovka, and a ground reconnaissance robot near Shevchenko. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf sends response to Donald Trump: 1- The President of the United States made seven claims in one hour, all seven of which were false. 2- They did not win the war with these lies, and they will certainly not get anywhere in negotiations either. 3- With the continuation of the blockade, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open. 4- Passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be conducted based on the "designated route" and with "Iranian authorization." 5- Whether the Strait is open or closed and the regulations governing it will be determined by the field, not by social media. 6- Media warfare and engineering public opinion are an important part of war, and the Iranian nation is not affected by these tricks. Read the real and accurate news of the negotiations in the recent interview of the Foreign Ministry spokesman. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）回应唐纳德·特朗普：1- 美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项全部是虚假的。2- 他们没有用这些谎言赢得战争，在谈判中也肯定不会有任何进展。3- 如果封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。4- 通过霍尔木兹海峡的通行将基于“指定航线”并经“伊朗授权”进行。5- 海峡是开放还是关闭以及管理它的规则将由实地情况决定，而不是由社交媒体决定。6- 媒体战和操纵舆论是战争的重要组成部分，伊朗民族不会受到这些伎俩的影响。请阅读外交部发言人最近采访中关于谈判的真实准确新闻。推文

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 特朗普阐述了他清除伊朗‘核尘埃’的计划。是的，这和他那种大脑靠巨无霸和健怡可乐运转的人所表现出的疯狂程度如出一辙。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 对上一条特朗普帖子的一个很好的后续。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Footage from a large gathering and drill honoring daughters who sacrificed their lives for Iran on Daughter’s Day.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 在女儿节纪念为伊朗牺牲生命的女儿们的大型集会和演习的视频片段。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump laid out his plan to remove the "nuclear dust" from Iran. And yes, it's exactly as unhinged as you'd expect from a man whose brain runs on Big Macs and Diet Coke. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普阐述了他清除伊朗“核尘埃”的计划。是的，这和他那种大脑靠巨无霸和健怡可乐运转的人所表现出的疯狂程度如出一辙。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 Listening to Trump talk about NATO is like listening to a butthurt 5 year old: "I called you TWO MONTHS AGO and you did nothing, so no, you can't sit with us." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 听特朗普谈论北约就像听一个受了委屈的5岁小孩说话：“我两个月前就给你打过电话，但你什么都没做，所以不行，你不能和我们坐在一起。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 "We will make Lebanon great again" - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 “我们将让黎巴嫩再次伟大” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 "I ended 8 wars, and if we add Iran and Lebanon, that will be 10 wars ended" - Trump Absolutely insane. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我结束了8场战争，如果算上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了10场战争” - 特朗普 简直疯了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 Trump is calling his planned military intervention in Cuba "A New Dawn For Cuba." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 特朗普称他计划对古巴进行的军事干预为“古巴的新黎明”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: A new round of US–Iran talks is set for Monday in Islamabad, Pakistan, according to Iranian officials. Source: CNN
text_zh: 据伊朗官员称，新一轮美伊会谈定于周一在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行。来源：CNN

text: Lukashenko: Trump showed the whole world that the United States of America is not all-powerful.
text_zh: 卢卡申科：特朗普向全世界表明，美利坚合众国并非无所不能。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump is speaking at the TPUSA event today. He claims he's "doing the best job" but then admits the party always loses the midterms and wonders why. For these upcoming midterms, the reason won't be hard to find. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普今天在TPUSA活动上发表讲话。他声称自己“做得最好”，但随后承认该党在中期选举中总是失败，并对此感到困惑。对于即将到来的中期选举，原因不难找到。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We will return American astronauts to the Moon, and we will plant our flag someday soon on Mars.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们将让美国宇航员重返月球，并且在不久的将来，我们终将把旗帜插在火星上。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸🇮🇷⚡Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: Iran’s enriched uranium is as sacred as the country’s soil and will under no circumstances be transferred anywhere." 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Mainstream media should update their news like WSJ.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸🇮🇷⚡伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗的浓缩铀与国家领土一样神圣，在任何情况下都不会转移到任何地方。” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 主流媒体应该像《华尔街日报》一样更新他们的新闻。

text: WarMonitor Not even getting into the whole “eight wars” claim, but wars he started definitely don’t count. Trump: I ended eight wars, and if we add Iran and Lebanon that will be ten wars ended and many many millions of lives saved https://x.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 甚至不去讨论所谓的“八场战争”说法，但他发动的战争肯定不算数。特朗普：我结束了八场战争，如果我们加上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了十场战争，挽救了数百万人的生命 https://x.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇱🇧U.S. President Trump promised to make Lebanon great again. "Our deal with Iran is not in any way tied to Lebanon, but we will make Lebanon great again. I mean, it's about time we get some we've we've sort of the world has forgotten them, and they're…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 U.S. President Trump promised to bring about a new dawn for Cuba. "Will also bring about a day, seventy years in waiting. It's called a new dawn for Cuba. We're gonna help them out with Cuba. We have a lot of great Cuban Americans. Not too many people in this audience, I don't think, but you go to Miami. We have people, Cuban Americans, people that were brutally treated, whose families were killed and brutalized. And now watch what happens." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇱🇧美国总统特朗普承诺让黎巴嫩再次伟大。“我们与伊朗的协议与黎巴嫩没有任何关系，但我们将让黎巴嫩再次伟大。我的意思是，是时候让我们……世界已经遗忘了他们，他们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 美国总统特朗普承诺为古巴带来新的曙光。“也将带来等待了七十年的那一天。这被称为古巴的新曙光。我们将帮助古巴。我们有很多伟大的古巴裔美国人。我想这个听众席里没多少人，但你去迈阿密看看。我们有古巴裔美国人，他们曾受到残酷对待，他们的家人被杀害和虐待。现在看着会发生什么。” @wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The speaker of the Iranian parliament says the Strait of Hormuz won't be open as long as the US blockade continues. ۱- رئیس جمهور آمریکا در یک ساعت هفت ادعا مطرح کرد که هر هفت ادعا کذب است. ۲- با این دروغگویی‌ها در جنگ پیروز نشدند و حتما در مذاکره هم راه به جایی نخواهند برد. ۳- با ادامهٔ محاصره، تنگهٔ هرمز باز نخواهد ماند. - محمدباقر قالیباف | MB Ghalibaf tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 伊朗议会议长表示，只要美国封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡就不会开放。1- 美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项主张全是谎言。2- 他们没有通过这些谎言赢得战争，在谈判中也绝对不会有任何进展。3- 如果封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。- 穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫 | MB Ghalibaf 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @JenDover69999 : @TheWarMonitor So 🤡 is partially right, it’s “open” under the control of Iran. Hey- half truths count for this guy,… tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @JenDover69999 : @TheWarMonitor 所以🤡说得对了一部分，它在伊朗的控制下是“开放”的。嘿，半真半假对这家伙来说算数，……推文
